CONFUSABLE_CONTRAST_ENABLED.notes: dark-ship confusable-contrast supply. Read: process.env.X === '1'. A5/A6 mastery-projection dark-ship sibling.

RESEARCH_MEETING_AGENT_ENABLED.notes: kill switch for the research-meeting agent nightly (dark-ship). Read via ENV const RESEARCH_MEETING_AGENT_ENABLED_ENV: process.env[X] !== '1'.

PLACEMENT_PROBE_ENABLED.notes: gates the placement probe. Hybrid: a module-load const that reads process.env.X === 'true'.

QUESTION_SUPPLY_REFILL_ENABLED.notes: dark-ship question-supply refill. Read via refillEnabled(): raw === 'true' || raw === '1' (accepts BOTH literals — the only flag that does).

JYEOO_FETCH_ENABLED.notes: YUK-697 kill switch for the jyeoo_fetch deterministic supply route. Dark-ship OPT-IN, default OFF. Read via jyeooFetchEnabled(): raw === 'true' || raw === '1'. OFF ⇒ dispatcher chooseAutoRoute skips jyeoo_fetch and falls back to sourcing_web; handler no-ops (skipped:disabled) if a job still reaches it.

WORKFLOW_JUDGE_AUTO_ENROLL_ENABLED.notes: CRITICAL-SAFETY auto-enroll gate. Read via autoEnrollEnabled() (name = AUTO_ENROLL_FLAG const): value.toLowerCase() === 'true'.

WORKFLOW_JUDGE_STUDENT_ANSWER_GRADING_EN.notes: student-answer grading gate (YUK-482 cut 4). Read via studentAnswerGradingEnabled() (name = STUDENT_ANSWER_GRADING_FLAG const): value.toLowerCase() === 'true'.

WORKFLOW_JUDGE_OBSERVE_ENABLED.notes: observe-only gate, DEFAULT ON (opt-out). Read via observeEnabled() (name = OBSERVE_FLAG const): !(value.toLowerCase() === 'false') — the disabling literal is 'false', not the enabling literal.

WAVE6_TRIGGER_MARK_WRONG_ENABLED.notes: note-refine mark_wrong trigger, DEFAULT ON (opt-out kill switch). Read via noteRefineTriggerEnabled() (name in FLAG_BY_KIND map): normalized 'true'→on / 'false'→off / else default.

WAVE6_TRIGGER_MASTERY_ENABLED.notes: note-refine mastery_change trigger, DEFAULT ON (opt-out kill switch). Same helper as the other WAVE6 triggers.

WAVE6_TRIGGER_DREAMING_ENABLED.notes: note-refine dreaming trigger, DEFAULT ON (opt-out kill switch). Same helper as the other WAVE6 triggers.

WAVE6_TRIGGER_VERIFY_ENABLED.notes: note-refine verify trigger, DEFAULT OFF (opt-in) — the ONE WAVE6 trigger whose default polarity differs (YUK-358 决定7, Red line 2). Same helper, same literal grammar; only the DEFAULT_ENABLED_BY_KIND default differs.

DAY_ONE_PRIOR_ENABLED.notes: compile-time const dark-ship. export const X = false.

EARLY_KLP_ENABLED.notes: compile-time const, shipped ON. export const X = true.

GRAPH_LAPLACIAN_ENABLED.notes: A5 mastery-projection graph-Laplacian borrow, dark. export const X = false. (audit:mastery-provenance names this as a borrow flag.)

HIERARCHICAL_ELO_ENABLED.notes: compile-time const, shipped ON. export const X = true.

MISCONCEPTION_RECURRENCE_ENABLED.notes: compile-time const dark-ship. export const X = false.

POLY_SIGMOID_ENABLED.notes: compile-time const dark-ship. export const X = false.

PREREQ_RISK_EMIT_ENABLED.notes: A13 prereq risk-emit producer, dark. export const X = false. Renamed FROM PREREQ_PROPAGATION_ENABLED to disambiguate.

PREREQ_THETA_PROPAGATION_ENABLED.notes: A6 directed theta-hat propagation borrow, dark. export const X = false. Renamed FROM PREREQ_PROPAGATION_ENABLED to disambiguate. (audit:mastery-provenance names this as a borrow flag.)

RECOMPUTE_BADGE_ENABLED.notes: compile-time const, shipped ON. export const X = true.

SRT_ENABLED.notes: compile-time const, shipped ON. export const X = true.

SRT_FISHER_WEIGHT_ENABLED.notes: compile-time const dark-ship. export const X = false.

THETA_GRID_ENABLED.notes: compile-time const dark-ship. export const X = false. A3 cold-start scoped erratum deadline is tied to this flag's flip.
